return(function(Q,f,k,G,z,N,O,U,H,m,y,o,R,Y,J,V,s,I,T,u,B,b,F,c,g)J,V,I,u,R,s,o,H,T,c,m,U,y,g,Y,B,F,b=function(Q,Z)local f=m(Z)local k=function(k,G,z)return V(Q,{k,G,z},Z,f)end return k
